1.description: Export composition by destination. The figure presents the share of exports to the top 10 export destinations according to export values. The data set covers 14,267 firms, 33 banks, and 22 export markets for the period 1994 to 2010. Country names are abbreviated by the country codes listed in TableII. The 12 countries that are not in the top 10 export destinations are pooled under the code “ROW.” [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]

2.description: Specialization measure: Example. The figure reports the average (2008 to 2010) portfolio shareSbtc$S_{bt}^c$by bank for two countries, the United States and Switzerland. Portfolio shares are calculated according to the definition in equation (2). [Color figure can be viewed atwileyonlinelibrary.com]
